# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
 * Description: A custom user authentication plugin with secure password handling
 * Version: 1.0
 */

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class CustomUserAuth {
    
    private $table_name;
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_users';
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_register_user', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_register_user', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_login_user', array($this, 'handle_login'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        $this->create_tables();
    }
    
    private function create_tables() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
            id mediumint(9) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            user_login varchar(60) NOT NULL,
            user_pass varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            user_email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            user_registered datetime DEFAULT '0000-00-00 00:00:00' NOT NULL,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY user_login (user_login),
            UNIQUE KEY user_email (user_email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('custom-auth', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/js/auth.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('custom-auth', 'ajax_object', array(
            'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('custom_auth_nonce')
        ));
    }
    
    public function handle_registration() {
        check_ajax_referer('custom_auth_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        $user_login = sanitize_user($_POST['user_login']);
        $user_email = sanitize_email($_POST['user_email']);
        $user_pass = $_POST['user_pass'];
        
        if (empty($user_login) || empty($user_email) || empty($user_pass)) {
            wp_send_json_error('All fields are required');
        }
        
        if (!is_email($user_email)) {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid email address');
        }
        
        if (strlen($user_pass) < 6) {
            wp_send_json_error('Password must be at least 6 characters');
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        // Check if user already exists
        $existing_user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE user_login = %s OR user_email = %s",
            $user_login,
            $user_email
        ));
        
        if ($existing_user) {
            wp_send_json_error('Username or email already exists');
        }
        
        // Hash password
        $hashed_password = password_hash($user_pass, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
        
        // Insert user
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'user_login' => $user_login,
                'user_pass' => $hashed_password,
                'user_email' => $user_email,
                'user_registered' => current_time('mysql')
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result !== false) {
            wp_send_json_success('User registered successfully');
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error('Registration failed');
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_login() {
        check_ajax_referer('custom_auth_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        $user_login = sanitize_user($_POST['user_login']);
        $user_pass = $_POST['user_pass'];
        
        if (empty($user_login) || empty($user_pass)) {
            wp_send_json_error('Username and password are required');
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        // Get user from database
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id, user_login, user_pass FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE user_login = %s OR user_email = %s",
            $user_login,
            $user_login
        ));
        
        if (!$user) {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid username or password');
        }
        
        // Verify password
        if (password_verify($user_pass, $user->user_pass)) {
            // Start session
            session_start();
            $_SESSION['user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['user_login'] = $user->user_login;
            
            wp_send_json_success('Login successful');
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error('Invalid username or password');
        }
    }
    
    public function is_logged_in() {
        session_start();
        return isset($_SESSION['user_id']);
    }
    
    public function get_current_user() {
        session_start();
        if (isset($_SESSION['user_id'])) {
            global $wpdb;
            return $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT id, user_login, user_email FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE id = %d",
                $_SESSION['user_id']
            ));
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    public function logout() {
        session_start();
        session_destroy();
        wp_send_json_success('Logged out successfully');
    }
}

// Initialize plugin
$custom_auth = new CustomUserAuth();

// Shortcodes for login and registration forms
function custom_auth_forms() {
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <div class="custom-auth-forms">
        <div class="login-form">
            <h3>Login</h3>
            <form id="login-form">
                <input type="text" id="login-username" placeholder="Username or Email" required>
                <input type="password" id="login-password" placeholder="Password" required>
                <button type="submit">Login</button>
            </form>
            <div id="login-message"></div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="register-form">
            <h3>Register</h3>
            <form id="register-form">
                <input type="text" id="register-username" placeholder="Username" required>
                <input type="email" id="register-email" placeholder="Email" required>
                <input type="password" id="register-password" placeholder="Password" required>
                <button type="submit">Register</button>
            </form>
            <div id="register-message"></div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}
add_shortcode('custom_auth_forms', 'custom_auth_forms');

// AJAX endpoint for logout
add_action('wp_ajax_logout_user', function() {
    global $custom_auth;
    $custom_auth->logout();
});
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_logout_user', function() {
    global $custom_auth;
    $custom_auth->logout();
});
?>
